struct SearchResultData {\n70\t    pub body: serde_json::Value,\n71\t}\n72\t\n73\t/// Multi-search executor.\n74\tpub struct MultiSearchExecutor {\n75\t    /// Configuration.\n76\t    config: }\n83\t    }\n84\t\n85\t    /// Create a new multi-search executor from advanced config.\n86\t    pub fn from_advanced(config: AdvancedMultiSearchConfig) -> Self {\n87\t        Self { config }\n88\t    }\n89\t\n90\t    /// Execute a multi-search request.\n91\t    ///\n92\t    /// Executes each query independently and returns results in input order.\n93\t    /// Each query is executed via the provided executor function.\n94\t    pub async fn execute<F, Fut>(\n95\t        &self,\n96\t        request: MultiSearchRequest,\n97\t        mut executor: F,\n98\t    ) -> Result<MultiSearchResponse>\n99\t    where\n100\t        F: FnMut(SearchQuery) -> Fut,\n101\t        Fut: std::future::Future<Output = Result<SearchResultData>>,\n102\t    {\n103\t        self.validate(&request)?;\n104\t\n105\t        // Execute all queries in parallel\n106\t        let mut tasks = Vec::with_capacity(request.queries.len());\n107\t        for query in request.queries {\n108\t            tasks.push(executor(query));\n109\t        }\n110\t\n111\t        let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n112\t\n113\t        // Convert results to SearchResults\n114\t        let search_results: Vec<SearchResult> = results\n115\t            .into_iter()\n116\t            .map(|r| match r {\n117\t                Ok(data) => SearchResult {\n118\t                    status: 200,\n119\t                    body: Some(data.body),\n120\t                    error: None,\n121\t                    code: None,\n122\t                },\n123\t                Err(e) => SearchResult {\n124\t                    status: 500,\n125\t                    body: None,\n126\t                    error: Some(e.to_string()),\n127\t                    code: Some(\"internal_error\".to_string()),\n128\t                },\n129\t            })\n130\t            .collect();\n131\t\n132\t        Ok(MultiSearchResponse {\n133\t            results: search_results,\n134\t        })\n135\t    }\n136\t\n137\t    /// Validate a multi-search request.\n138\t    pub fn validate(&self, request: &MultiSearchRequest) -> Result<()> {\n139\t        if !self.config.enabled {\n140\t            return Err(MiroirError::InvalidRequest(\"multi-search is disabled\".into()));\n141\t        }\n142\t\n143\t        if request.queries.is_empty() {\n144\t            return Err(MiroirError::InvalidRequest(\"queries array is empty\".into()));\n145\t        }\n146\t\n147\t        if request.queries.len() > self.config.max_queries_per_batch as usize {\n148\t            return Err(MiroirError::InvalidRequest(format!(\n149\t                \"too many queries: {} exceeds maximum of {}\",\n150\t                request.queries.len(),\n151\t                self.config.max_queries_per_batch\n152\t            )));\n153\t        }\n154\t\n155\t        Ok(())\n156\t    }\n157\t}\n158\t\n159\timpl Default for MultiSearchExecutor {\n160\t    fn default() -> Self {\n161\t        Self::new(MultiSearchConfig::default())\n162\t    }\n163\t}\n164\t\n165\t#[cfg(test)]\n166\tmod tests {\n167\t    use super::*;\n168\t\n169\t    #[test]\n170\t    fn This handler implements the `dfs_query_then_fetch` pattern:\n151\t/// 1. **Preflight phase**: Send term-frequency query to all shards, aggregate\n152\t///    global document frequencies at the coordinator.\n153\t/// 2. **Search phase**: Send the search query with global IDF attached so that\n154\t///    scoring uses corpus-wide statistics instead of per-shard local IDF.\n155\t///\n156\t/// }\n212\t                Err(e) => {\n213\t                    warn!(error = %e, \"failed to check search UI rate limit\");\n214\t                    // Continue anyway on error (fail-open)\n215\t                }\n216\t            }\n217\t        }\n218\t    } else if backend == \"local\" {\n219\t        let (allowed, _wait_seconds) = state.local_search_ui_rate_limiter.check(\n220\t            &source_ip,\n221\t            limit,\n222\t            window_seconds * 1000,\n223\t        );\n224\t        if !allowed {\n225\t            warn!(\n226\t                source_ip_hash = }\n232\t\n233\t    // Resolve alias to concrete index UID (plan §13.7)\n234\t    // Aliases are resolved at routing time; resolved index is used for scatter planning\n235\t    let (effective_index, resolved_targets) = if state.config.aliases.enabled {\n236\t        let targets = state.alias_registry.resolve(&index).await;\n237\t        state.metrics.inc_alias_resolution(&index);\n238\t        if };\n249\t\n250\t    // Session pinning logic (plan §13.6): Check if session has pending write\n251\t    let (pinned_group, strategy_label) = if let Some(ref sid) = sid {\n252\t        if let  ).await {\n265\t                        Ok(true) => {\n266\t                            // Write succeeded, clear pin and use normal routing\n267\t                            let wait_duration = state.metrics.inc_session_pin_enforced(\"block\");\n270\t                            (None, Some(\"block_success\"))\n271\t                        }\n272\t                        Ok(false) => {\n273\t                     let wait_duration = wait_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n282\t                            state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n283\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_wait_timeout(\"block\");\n284\t                            (Some(group), Some(\"block_timeout\"))\n285\t                        }\n286\t                    }\n287\t state.metrics.inc_session_pin_enforced(\"route_pin\");\n291\t                    (Some(group), Some(\"route_pin\"))\n292\t                }\n293\t            }\n294\t        } else {\n295\t            // No pending write - normal routing\n296\t            (None, None)\n297\t        }\n298\t    } else {\n299\t        // No session header - normal routing\n300\t        (None, None)\n301\t    };\n302\t\n303\t    // Log session pinning decision for observability\n304\t    if let Some(label) = strategy_label {\n305\t        debug!(\n306\t            session_id = ?sid,\n307\t           };\n350\t\n351\t                    // Build response with appropriate headers\n352\t                    let mut response = Response::builder()\n353\t                        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n354\t                        .header(\"content-type\", \"application/json\");\n355\t\n356\t                    // Add settings headers\n357\t                    if }\n360\t                    if settings_version > 0 {\n361\t                        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Version\", settings_version.to_string());\n362\t                    }\n363\t\n364\t                    let response = response\n365\t                        .body(axum::body::Body::from(serde_json::to_string(&response_body).unwrap()))\n366\t                        .unwrap();\n367\t\n368\t                    tracing::info!(\n369\t                        target: \"miroir.search_coalesced\",\n370\t                        index = %effective_index,\n371\t Err(StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE);\n520\t                }\n521\t            }\n522\t        } else {\n523\t            // No version floor requested, use normal planning\n524\t            plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, state.config.replication_factor as usize, state.config.shards, replica_selector_ref).await\n525\t        }\n526\t    };\n527\t    let node_count = plan.shard_to_node.len() as u64;\n528\t\n529\t    // Record scatter fan-out size before executing\n530\t    state.metrics.record_scatter_fan_out(node_count);\n531\t\n532\t    // Build search request\n533\t    let rest_body = body.rest.clone(); // Clone before body is partially moved\n534\t    let search_req = SearchRequest {\n535\t        index_uid: effective_index.clone(),\n536\t        query: body.q,\n537\t        offset: body.offset.unwrap_or(0),\n538\t        limit: body.limit.unwrap_or(20),\n539\t        filter: body.filter,\n540\t        facets: body.facets,\n541\t        ranking_score: client_requested_score,\n542\t        body: rest_body,\n543\t        global_idf: None,\n544\t    };\n545\t\n546\t    // Create node client with the scoped key (or node_master_key as fallback)\n547\t    let http_client = Arc::new(crate::client::HttpClient::new(\n548\t        search_key,\n549\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n550\t    ));\n551\t    let client = ProxyNodeClient::new(http_client, state.metrics.clone(), None);\n552\t\n553\t    // Use score-based merge strategy (OP#4: requires global IDF)\n554\t    let strategy = ScoreMergeStrategy::new();\n555\t\n556\t    // Register for query coalescing (plan §13.10) - after try_coalesce, before scatter\n557\t    // Only register if coalescing is enabled and this is a single-target query\n558\t    let (tx, fingerprint) = if state.config.query_coalescing.enabled && resolved_targets.len() == 1 {\n559\t        let settings_version = state.settings_broadcast.current_version().await;\n560\t        let query_json = serde_json::to_string(&body).unwrap_or_default();\n561\t        let fp = QueryFingerprint {\n562\t            index: effective_index.clone(),\n563\t            query_json,\n564\t            settings_version,\n565\t        };\n566\t\n567\t        match state.query_coalescer.register(fp.clone()).await {\n568\t            Ok(broadcast_tx) => {\n569\t                state.metrics.inc_query_coalesce_subscribers(1); // First subscriber = the query itself\n570\t                (Some(broadcast_tx), Some(fp))\n571\t            }\n572\t            Err(_) => {\n573\t                // Failed to register (too many pending queries) - proceed without coalescing\n574\t                debug!(\"too many pending queries, proceeding without coalescing registration\");\n575\t                (None, None)\n576\t            }\n577\t        }\n578\t    } else {\n579\t        (None, None)\n580\t    };\n581\t\n582\t    // Execute DFS query-then-fetch\n583\t    let mut result = dfs_query_then_fetch_search(\n584\t        plan,\n585\t        &client,\n586\t        search_req,\n587\t        &topo,\n588\t        policy,\n589\t        &strategy,\n590\t    )\n591\t    .await\n592\t    .map_err(|e| {\n593\t        tracing::error!(error = %e, \"search failed\");\n594\t        StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR\n595\t    })?;\n596\t\n597\t    // Drop topology lock before building response\n598\t    drop(topo);\n599\t\n600\t    // Strip internal fields from hits\n601\t    for hit in &mut result.hits {\n602\t        strip_internal_fields(hit, client_requested_score);\n603\t    }\n604\t\n605\t    // Build response body\n606\t    let response_body = serde_json::json!({\n607\t        \"hits\": result.hits,\n608\t        \"estimatedTotalHits\": result.estimated_total_hits,\n609\t        \"processingTimeMs\": result.processing_time_ms,\n610\t    });\n611\t\n612\t    // Only include facetDistribution if facets were requested\n613\t    let mut body = response_body.clone();\n614\t    if let Some(facets) = &result.facet_distribution {\n615\t        body[\"facetDistribution\"] = serde_json::to_value(facets).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n616\t    }\n617\t\n618\t    // Broadcast result to coalesced queries (plan §13.10)\n619\t    if let (Some(broadcast_tx), Some(fp)) = (tx, fingerprint) {\n620\t        let response_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&body).unwrap_or_default();\n621\t        let subscriber_count = broadcast_tx.receiver_count();\n622\t        if subscriber_count > 1 {\n623\t            // There are other queries waiting for this result - broadcast to them\n624\t            state.metrics.inc_query_coalesce_subscribers(subscriber_count as u64 - 1);\n625\t            let _ = broadcast_tx.send(response_bytes.clone());\n626\t            debug!(\n627\t                index = %effective_index,\n628\t                subscribers = subscriber_count - 1,\n629\t                \"broadcast search result to coalesced queries\"\n630\t            );\n631\t        }\n632\t        // Unregister the query after broadcasting\n633\t        state.query_coalescer.unregister(&fp).await;\n634\t    }\n635\t\n636\t    // Build response with optional headers\n637\t    let mut response = Response::builder()\n638\t        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n639\t        .header(\"content-type\", \"application/json\");\n640\t\n641\t    // Add X-Miroir-Settings-Inconsistent header if a broadcast is in flight (plan §13.5)\n642\t    if state.settings_broadcast.is_in_flight(&effective_index).await {\n643\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Inconsistent\", \"true\");\n644\t    }\n645\t\n646\t    // Add X-Miroir-Settings-Version header if we have a version for this index\n647\t    let current_version = state.settings_broadcast.current_version().await;\n648\t    if current_version > 0 {\n649\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Version\", current_version.to_string());\n650\t    }\n651\t\n652\t    if result.degraded {\n653\t        state.metrics.inc_scatter_partial_responses();\n654\t    }\n655\t\n656\t    if result.degraded && !result.failed_shards.is_empty() {\n657\t        let mut sorted_shards = result.failed_shards.clone();\n658\t        sorted_shards.sort();\n659\t        let shard_ids = sorted_shards.iter()\n660\t            .map(|id| id.to_string())\n661\t            .collect::<Vec<_>>()\n662\t            .join(\",\");\n663\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", format!(\"shards={}\", shard_ids));\n664\t    } else if result.degraded {\n665\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", \"partial\");\n666\t    }\n667\t\n668\t    let response = response\n669\t        .body(axum::body::Body::from(serde_json::to_string(&body).unwrap()))\n670\t        .unwrap();\n671\t\n672\t    // Structured log entry (plan §10 shape)\n673\t    // request_id and pod_id are included from the middleware span via\n674\t    // .with_current_span(true) on the JSON subscriber layer.\n675\t    tracing::info!(\n676\t        target: \"miroir.search\",\n677\t        index = %effective_index,\n678\t        duration_ms = start.elapsed().as_millis() as u64,\n679\t        node_count = node_count,\n680\t        estimated_hits = result.estimated_total_hits,\n681\t        degraded = result.degraded,\n682\t        \"search completed\"\n683\t    );\n684\t\n685\t    Ok(response)\n686\t}\n687\t\n688\t/// Search multiple target indexes (for multi-target aliases, plan §13.7, §13.11, §13.17).\n689\t///\n690\t/// Fans out the search to all target indexes and merges results by _rankingScore.\n691\t/// Used by ILM read_alias queries.\n692\tasync fn search_multi_targets(\n693\t    targets: Vec<String>,\n694\t    body: SearchRequestBody,\n695\t    state: Arc<AppState>,\n696\t    headers: HeaderMap,\n697\t    session_id: Option<String>,\n698\t    client_requested_score: bool,\n699\t) -> Result<Response, StatusCode> {\n700\t    let start = Instant::now();\n701\t\n702\t    // Extract session ID if provided\n703\t    let sid = session_id;\n704\t\n705\t    // Extract source IP from X-Forwarded-For or X-Real-IP (trust proxy)\n706\t    let source_ip = headers\n707\t        .get(\"x-forwarded-for\")\n708\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n709\t        .and_then(|s| s.split(',').next())\n710\t        .or_else(|| headers.get(\"x-real-ip\").and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok()))\n711\t        .unwrap_or(\"unknown\")\n712\t        .trim()\n713\t        .to_string();\n714\t\n715\t    // Check rate limit for search UI (plan §4)\n716\t    let (limit, window_seconds) = match parse_rate_limit(&state.config.search_ui.rate_limit.per_ip) {\n717\t        Ok(parsed) => parsed,\n718\t        Err(e) => {\n719\t            warn!(error = %e, \"invalid search_ui.rate_limit.per_ip config, using default\");\n720\t            (60, 60) // Default: 60 requests per minute\n721\t        }\n722\t    };\n723\t\n724\t    let backend = state.config.search_ui.rate_limit.backend.as_str();\n725\t    if backend == \"redis\" {\n726\t        if let Some(ref redis) = state.redis_store {\n727\t            match redis.check_rate_limit_search_ui(&source_ip, limit, window_seconds) {\n728\t                Ok((allowed, _wait_seconds)) => {\n729\t                    if !allowed {\n730\t                        warn!(\n731\t                            source_ip_hash = hash_for_log(&source_ip),\n732\t                            \"search UI rate limited (redis)\"\n733\t                        );\n734\t                        return Err(StatusCode::TOO_MANY_REQUESTS);\n735\t                    }\n736\t                    // Allowed, proceed\n737\t                }\n738\t                Err(e) => {\n739\t                    warn!(error = %e, \"failed to check search UI rate limit\");\n740\t                    // Continue anyway on error (fail-open)\n741\t                }\n742\t            }\n743\t        }\n744\t    } else if backend == \"local\" {\n745\t        let (allowed, _wait_seconds) = state.local_search_ui_rate_limiter.check(\n746\t            &source_ip,\n747\t            limit,\n748\t            window_seconds * 1000,\n749\t        );\n750\t        if !allowed {\n751\t            warn!(\n752\t                source_ip_hash = hash_for_log(&source_ip),\n753\t                \"search UI rate limited (local backend)\"\n754\t            );\n755\t            return Err(StatusCode::TOO_MANY_REQUESTS);\n756\t        }\n757\t    }\n758\t\n759\t    // Session pinning logic (plan §13.6): Check if session has pending write\n760\t    let (pinned_group, _strategy_label) = if let Some(ref sid) = sid {\n761\t        if let Some(group) = state.session_manager.get_pinned_group(sid).await {\n762\t            // Session has a pending write - apply wait strategy\n763\t            let strategy = state.session_manager.wait_strategy();\n764\t            match strategy {\n765\t                WaitStrategy::Block => {\n766\t                    // Block until write completes or timeout\n767\t                    let max_wait = state.session_manager.max_wait_duration();\n768\t                    let wait_start = std::time::Instant::now();\n769\t                    match state.session_manager.wait_for_write_completion(\n770\t                        sid,\n771\t                        &state.task_registry,\n772\t                        max_wait,\n773\t                    ).await {\n774\t                        Ok(true) => {\n775\t                            // Write succeeded, clear pin and use normal routing\n776\t                            let wait_duration = wait_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n777\t                            state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n778\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_pin_enforced(\"block\");\n779\t                            (None::<u32>, None::<u64>)\n780\t                        }\n781\t                        Ok(false) => {\n782\t                            // Write failed, clear pin\n783\t                            let wait_duration = wait_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n784\t                            state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n785\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_wait_timeout(\"block\");\n786\t                            (None::<u32>, None::<u64>)\n787\t                        }\n788\t                        Err(_) => {\n789\t                            // Timeout - route to pinned group (best effort)\n790\t                            let wait_duration = wait_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n791\t                            state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n792\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_wait_timeout(\"block\");\n793\t                            (Some(group), None::<u64>)\n794\t                        }\n795\t                    }\n796\t                }\n797\t                WaitStrategy::RoutePin => {\n798\t                    // Route to pinned group without waiting\n799\t                    state.metrics.inc_session_pin_enforced(\"route_pin\");\n800\t                    (Some(group), None::<u64>)\n801\t                }\n802\t            }\n803\t        } else {\n804\t            // No pending write - normal routing\n805\t            (None::<u32>, None::<u64>)\n806\t        }\n807\t    } else {\n808\t        // No session header - normal routing\n809\t        (None::<u32>, None::<u64>)\n810\t    };\n811\t\n812\t    // For multi-target aliases, we use the first target for settings/scoped key\n813\t    // All targets should have compatible settings (managed by ILM)\n814\t    let primary_target = targets.first().ok_or_else(|| {\n815\t        error!(\"multi-target alias has no targets\");\n816\t        StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR\n817\t    })?;\n818\t\n819\t    // Get the scoped key for the primary target\n820\t    let search_key = if let Some(ref redis) = state.redis_store {\n821\t        if let Ok(Some(sk)) = redis.get_search_ui_scoped_key(primary_target) {\n822\t            // Refresh scoped-key beacon\n823\t            let _ = redis.observe_search_ui_scoped_key(\n824\t                &state.pod_id,\n825\t                primary_target,\n826\t                sk.generation,\n827\t            );\n828\t            sk.primary_key\n829\t        } else {\n830\t            state.config.node_master_key.clone()\n831\t        }\n832\t    } else {\n833\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone()\n834\t    };\n835\t\n836\t    // Extract X-Miroir-Min-Settings-Version header\n837\t    let min_settings_version = headers\n838\t        .get(\"X-Miroir-Min-Settings-Version\")\n839\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n840\t        .and_then(|s| s.parse::<u64>().ok());\n841\t\n842\t    // Use live topology from shared state\n843\t    let topo = state.topology.read().await;\n844\t    let policy = match state.config.scatter.unavailable_shard_policy.as_str() {\n845\t        \"partial\" => UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial,\n846\t        \"error\" => UnavailableShardPolicy::Error,\n847\t        \"fallback\" => UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback,\n848\t        _ => return Err(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR),\n849\t    };\n850\t\n851\t    // Plan scatter for primary target (for ILM read aliases, all targets\n852\t    // should have identical shard layout)\n853\t    let plan = {\n854\t        let _plan_span = tracing::info_span!(\n855\t            \"scatter_plan_multi_target\",\n856\t            primary_target = %primary_target,\n857\t            replica_groups = state.config.replica_groups,\n858\t            shards = state.config.shards,\n859\t            rf = state.config.replication_factor,\n860\t            min_settings_version,\n861\t            pinned_group = ?pinned_group,\n862\t            target_count = targets.len(),\n863\t        ).entered();\n864\t\n865\t        if let Some(group) = pinned_group {\n866\t            match plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n867\t                &topo,\n868\t                0,\n869\t                state.config.replication_factor as usize,\n870\t                state.config.shards,\n871\t                group,\n872\t                None,\n873\t            ) {\n874\t                Some(p) => p,\n875\t                None => {\n876\t                    warn!(\n877\t                        pinned_group = group,\n878\t                        \"pinned group unavailable, falling back to normal routing\"\n879\t                    );\n880\t                    plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, state.config.replication_factor as usize, state.config.shards, None).await\n881\t                }\n882\t            }\n883\t        } else if let Some(floor) = min_settings_version {\n884\t            let settings_broadcast = state.settings_broadcast.clone();\n885\t            let plan_result = plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n886\t                &topo,\n887\t                0,\n888\t                state.config.replication_factor as usize,\n889\t                state.config.shards,\n890\t                primary_target,\n891\t                floor,\n892\t                &move |idx, node_id| {\n893\t                    let sb = settings_broadcast.clone();\n894\t                    let idx = idx.to_string();\n895\t                    let node_id = node_id.to_string();\n896\t                    tokio::task::block_in_place(|| {\n897\t                        tokio::runtime::Handle::current().block_on(async {\n898\t                            sb.node_version(&idx, &node_id).await\n899\t                        })\n900\t                    })\n901\t                },\n902\t            );\n903\t\n904\t            match plan_result {\n905\t                Some(p) => p,\n906\t                None => {\n907\t                    let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n908\t                        MiroirCode::SettingsVersionStale,\n909\t                        format!(\n910\t                            \"no covering set available for settings version floor {} on index '{}'\",\n911\t                            floor, primary_target\n912\t                        ),\n913\t                    );\n914\t                    return Err(StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE);\n915\t                }\n916\t            }\n917\t        } else {\n918\t            plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, state.config.replication_factor as usize, state.config.shards)\n919\t        }\n920\t    };\n921\t    let node_count = plan.shard_to_node.len() as u64;\n922\t\n923\t    // Record scatter fan-out size\n924\t    state.metrics.record_scatter_fan_out(node_count);\n925\t\n926\t    // Build search request for primary target\n927\t    let search_req = SearchRequest {\n928\t        index_uid: primary_target.to_string(),\n929\t        query: body.q.clone(),\n930\t        offset: body.offset.unwrap_or(0),\n931\t        limit: body.limit.unwrap_or(20),\n932\t        filter: body.filter.clone(),\n933\t        facets: body.facets.clone(),\n934\t        ranking_score: client_requested_score,\n935\t        body: body.rest.clone(),\n936\t        global_idf: None,\n937\t    };\n938\t\n939\t    // Create node client\n940\t    let http_client = Arc::new(crate::client::HttpClient::new(\n941\t        search_key,\n942\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n943\t    ));\n944\t    let client = ProxyNodeClient::new(http_client, state.metrics.clone(), None);\n945\t\n946\t    // Use score-based merge strategy\n947\t    let strategy = ScoreMergeStrategy::new();\n948\t\n949\t    // Execute search\n950\t    let mut result = dfs_query_then_fetch_search(\n951\t        plan,\n952\t        &client,\n953\t        search_req,\n954\t        &topo,\n955\t        policy,\n956\t        &strategy,\n957\t    )\n958\t    .await\n959\t    .map_err(|e| {\n960\t        tracing::error!(error = %e, \"multi-target search failed\");\n961\t        StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR\n962\t    })?;\n963\t\n964\t    // Drop topology lock before building response\n965\t    drop(topo);\n966\t\n967\t    // Strip internal fields from hits\n968\t    for hit in &mut result.hits {\n969\t        strip_internal_fields(hit, client_requested_score);\n970\t    }\n971\t\n972\t    // Build response body\n973\t    let mut response_body = serde_json::json!({\n974\t        \"hits\": result.hits,\n975\t        \"estimatedTotalHits\": result.estimated_total_hits,\n976\t        \"processingTimeMs\": result.processing_time_ms,\n977\t    });\n978\t\n979\t    // Only include facetDistribution if facets were requested\n980\t    if let Some(facets) = &result.facet_distribution {\n981\t        response_body[\"facetDistribution\"] = serde_json::to_value(facets).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n982\t    }\n983\t\n984\t    // Build response with optional headers\n985\t    let mut response = Response::builder()\n986\t        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n987\t        .header(\"content-type\", \"application/json\");\n988\t\n989\t    // Add settings headers\n990\t    if state.settings_broadcast.is_in_flight(primary_target).await {\n991\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Inconsistent\", \"true\");\n992\t    }\n993\t\n994\t    let current_version = state.settings_broadcast.current_version().await;\n995\t    if current_version > 0 {\n996\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Version\", current_version.to_string());\n997\t    }\n998\t\n999\t    if result.degraded {\n1000\t        state.metrics.inc_scatter_partial_responses();\n1001\t    }\n1002\t\n1003\t    if result.degraded && !result.failed_shards.is_empty() {\n1004\t        let mut sorted_shards = result.failed_shards.clone();\n1005\t        sorted_shards.sort();\n1006\t        let shard_ids = sorted_shards.iter()\n1007\t            .map(|id| id.to_string())\n1008\t            .collect::<Vec<_>>()\n1009\t            .join(\",\");\n1010\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", format!(\"shards={}\", shard_ids));\n1011\t    } else if result.degraded {\n1012\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", \"partial\");\n1013\t    }\n1014\t\n1015\t    let response = response\n1016\t        .body(axum::body::Body::from(serde_json::to_string(&response_body).unwrap()))\n1017\t        .unwrap();\n1018\t\n1019\t    // Structured log entry\n1020\t    tracing::info!(\n1021\t        target: \"miroir.search_multi_target\",\n1022\t        primary_target = %primary_target,\n1023\t        target_count = targets.len(),\n1024\t        duration_ms = start.elapsed().as_millis() as u64,\n1025\t        node_count = node_count,\n1026\t        estimated_hits = result.estimated_total_hits,\n1027\t        degraded = result.degraded,\n1028\t        \"multi-target search completed\"\n1029\t    );\n1030\t\n1031\t    Ok(response)\n1032\t}\n1033\t\n1034\t/// Strip `_miroir_shard` from all hits (always).\n1035\t/// Strip `_rankingScore` unless the client explicitly requested it.\n1036\tpub fn strip_internal_fields(hit: &mut Value, client_requested_score: bool) {\n1037\t    if let Some(obj) = hit.as_object_mut() {\n1038\t        obj.remove(\"_miroir_shard\");\n1039\t        if !client_requested_score {\n1040\t            obj.remove(\"_rankingScore\");\n1041\t        }\n1042\t    }\n1043\t}\n1044\t\n1045\t#[cfg(test)]\n1046\tmod tests {\n1047\t    use super::*;\n1048\t\n1049\t    #[test]\n1050\t    fn test_search_request_debug_redaction() {\n1051\t        let body = SearchRequestBody {\n1052\t            q: Some(\"sensitive user query about private data\".to_string()),\n1053\t            offset: Some(0),\n1054\t            limit: Some(20),\n1055\t            filter: Some(serde_json::json!({\"email\": \"user@example.com\"})),\n1056\t            facets: Some(vec![\"category\".to_string()]),\n1057\t            ranking_score: Some(false),\n1058\t            rest: serde_json::json!({}),\n1059\t        };\n1060\t        let debug_output = format!(\"{:?}\", body);\n1061\t\n1062\t        assert!(\n1063\t            !debug_output.contains(\"sensitive\"),\n1064\t            \"Debug output should not contain raw query text\"\n1065\t        );\n1066\t        assert!(\n1067\t            !debug_output.contains(\"user@example.com\"),\n1068\t            \"Debug output should not contain filter values\"\n1069\t        );\n1070\t resp.avg_doc_length * resp.total_docs as f64;\n75\t            for (term, stats) in &resp.term_stats {\n76\t                *term_df.entry(term.clone()).or_insert(0) += stats.df;\n77\t            }\n78\t        }\n79\t\n80\t        let avg_doc_length = if total_docs > 0 {\n81\t            total_length / total_docs as f64\n82\t        } else {\n83\t            0.0\n84\t        };\n85\t\n86\t        let n = total_docs as f64;\n87\t        let terms = term_df\n88\t            .into_iter()\n89\t            .map(|(term, df)| {\n90\t                let idf = if df == 0 {\n91\t                    0.0\n92\t                } else {\n93\t                    ((n - df as f64 + 0.5) / (df as f64 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0\n94\t                };\n95\t                (term, GlobalTermStats { df, idf })\n96\t            })\n97\t            .collect();\n98\t\n99\t        Self { total_docs, avg_doc_length, terms }\n100\t    }\n101\t}\n102\t\n103\t// SearchRequest {\n341\t    /// Build the request body for sending to a node.\n342\t    ///\n343\t    /// Injects `showRankingScore: true` unconditionally so the merger can global-sort.\n344\t    /// Each node receives `offset + limit` results to ensure the coordinator has enough\n345\t    /// data to apply pagination.\n346\t    pub fn to_node_body(&self) -> Value {\n347\t        let mut body = self.body.clone();\n348\t\n349\t        // Inject showRankingScore: true unconditionally for global sorting\n350\t        body[\"showRankingScore\"] = serde_json::json!(true);\n351\t\n352\t        // Set limit to offset + limit so we get enough results for pagination\n353\t        // (coordinator applies final offset/limit after merging)\n354\t        body[\"limit\"] = serde_json::json!(self.offset + self.limit);\n355\t\n356\t        // Set offset to 0 on individual nodes (coordinator handles offset)\n357\t        body[\"offset\"] = serde_json::json!(0);\n358\t\n359\t        // Ensure query is set\n360\t        if let Some(q) = &self.query {\n361\t            body[\"q\"] = serde_json::json!(q);\n362\t        }\n363\t\n364\t        // Ensure filter is set if provided\n365\t        if let Some(filter) = &self.filter {\n366\t            body[\"filter\"] = filter.clone();\n367\t        }\n368\t\n369\t        // Ensure facets are set if provided\n370\t        if let Some(facets) = &self.facets {\n371\t            body[\"facets\"] = serde_json::json!(facets);\n372\t        }\n373\t\n374\t        body\n375\t    }\n376\t}\n377\t\n378\t#[derive(Debug)]\n379\tpub struct ScatterResult {\n380\t    pub shard_pages: Vec<ShardHitPage>,\n381\t    pub failed_shards: HashMap<u32, NodeError>,\n382\t    pub partial: bool,\n383\t    pub deadline_exceeded: bool,\n384\t}\n385\t\n386\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\n387\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter(\n388\t    topology: &Topology,\n389\t    query_seq: u64,\n390\t    rf: usize,\n391\t    shard_count: u32,\n392\t    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n393\t) -> ScatterPlan {\n394\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n395\t\n396\t    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n397\t        Some(g) => g,\n398\t        None => {\n399\t            return      }\n404\t    };\n405\t\n406\t    let _covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n407\t\n408\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n409\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n410\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n411\t\n412\t        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n413\t            match selector.select(&replicas, chosen_group).await {\n414\t                Some(node) => node,\n415\t                None => replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone(),\n416\t            }\n417\t        } else {\n418\t            replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone()\n419\t        };\n420\t\n421\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n422\t    }\n423\t\n424\t    ScatterPlan {\n425\t        chosen_group,\n426\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n427\t        shard_to_node,\n428\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n429\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n430\t    }\n431\t}\n432\t\n433\t/// Plan search scatter with settings version floor filtering (plan §13.5).\n434\t///\n435\t/// Excludes nodes whose settings version for the given index is below `floor`.\n436\t/// Returns None if no covering set can be assembled (caller should return 503).\n437\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n438\t    topology: &Topology,\n439\t    query_seq: u64,\n440\t    rf: usize,\n441\t    shard_count: u32,\n442\t    index: &str,\n443\t    floor: u64,\n444\t    version_checker: &impl Fn(&str, &str) -> u64,\n445\t    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n446\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n447\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n448\t\n449\t    let group = topology.group(chosen_group)?;\n450\t\n451\t    let covering = covering_set_with_version_floor(\n452\t        shard_count,\n453\t        group,\n454\t        rf,\n455\t        query_seq,\n456\t        index,\n457\t        floor,\n458\t        version_checker,\n459\t    )?;\n460\t\n461\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n462\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n463\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n464\t        // Filter by version floor\n465\t        let eligible: Vec<_> = replicas\n466\t            .iter()\n467\t            .filter(|node_id| {\n468\t                let version = version_checker(index, node_id.as_str());\n469\t                version >= floor\n470\t            })\n471\t            .collect();\n472\t\n473\t        if eligible.is_empty() {\n474\t            return None;\n475\t        }\n476\t\n477\t        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n478\t            // Convert Vec<&NodeId> to Vec<NodeId> for selector\n479\t            let eligible_owned: Vec<NodeId> = eligible.iter().map(|&n| n.clone()).collect();\n480\t            match selector.select(&eligible_owned, chosen_group).await {\n481\t                Some(node) => node,\n482\t                None => eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()].clone(),\n483\t            }\n484\t        } else {\n485\t            eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()].clone()\n486\t        };\n487\t\n488\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected.clone());\n489\t    }\n490\t\n491\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n492\t        chosen_group,\n493\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n494\t        shard_to_node,\n495\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n496\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n497\t    })\n498\t}\n499\t\n500\t/// Plan search scatter for a specific replica group (plan §13.6 session pinning).\n501\t///\n502\t/// Used when a session has a pending write and needs to read from the pinned group\n503\t/// to ensure read-your-writes consistency.\n504\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n505\t    topology: &Topology,\n506\t    query_seq: u64,\n507\t    rf: usize,\n508\t    shard_count: u32,\n509\t    pinned_group: u32,\n510\t    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n511\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n512\t    let group crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n517\t        if replicas.is_empty() {\n518\t            continue;\n519\t        }\n520\t\n521\t        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n522\t            match selector.select(&replicas, pinned_group).await {\n523\t                Some(node) => node,\n524\t                None => replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone(),\n525\t            }\n526\t        } else {\n527\t            replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone()\n528\t        };\n529\t\n530\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n531\t    }\n532\t\n533\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n534\t        chosen_group: pinned_group,\n535\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n536\t        shard_to_node,\n537\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n538\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n539\t    })\n540\t}\n541\t\n542\t/// Plan search scatter using adaptive replica selection (plan §13.3).\n543\t///\n544\t/// Uses EWMA-based scoring to select the best replica for each shard,\n545\t/// falling back to round-robin for shards with no metrics data.\n546\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\n547\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter_adaptive(\n548\t    topology: &Topology,\n549\t    query_seq: u64,\n550\t    rf: usize,\n551\t    shard_count: u32,\n552\t    replica_selector: &ReplicaSelector,\n553\t) -> ScatterPlan {\n554\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n555\t\n556\t    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n557\t        Some(g) => g,\n558\t        None => {\n559\t            return ScatterPlan {\n560\t                chosen_group,\n561\t                target_shards: Vec::new(),\n562\t                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(),\n563\t                deadline_ms: 0,\n564\t                hedging_eligible: false,\n565\t            };\n566\t        }\n567\t    };\n568\t\n569\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n570\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n571\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n572\t        if replicas.is_empty() {\n573\t            continue;\n574\t        }\n575\t\n576\t        // Use adaptive selection to pick the best replica\n577\t        let selected = match replica_selector.select(&replicas, chosen_group).await {\n578\t            Some(node) => node,\n579\t            None => {\n580\t                // Fallback to round-robin if selector returns None\n581\t                replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone()\n582\t            }\n583\t        };\n584\t\n585\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n586\t    }\n587\t\n588\t    ScatterPlan {\n589\t        chosen_group,\n590\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n591\t        shard_to_node,\n592\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n593\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n594\t    }\n595\t}\n596\t\n597\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count))]\n598\tpub async fn execute_scatter<C: NodeClient>(\n599\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n600\t    client: &C,\n601\t    req: SearchRequest,\n602\t    topology: &Topology,\n603\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n604\t) -> Result<ScatterResult> {\n605\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n606\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n607\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n608\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n609\t        }\n610\t    }\n611\t    tracing::Span::current().record(\"node_count\", node_to_shards.len());\n612\t\n613\t    let mut shard_pages = Vec::new();\n614\t    let mut failed_shards = HashMap::new();\n615\t    let mut deadline_exceeded = false;\n616\t\n617\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n618\t    for (node_id, shards) in node_to_shards {\n619\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n620\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n621\t            None => {\n622\t                for shard_id in shards {\n623\t                    failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::NetworkError(\"node not in topology\".to_string()));\n624\t                }\n625\t                continue;\n626\t            }\n627\t        };\n628\t        let client_ref = client;\n629\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n630\t        let node_id_clone = node_id.clone();\n631\t        let shard_count = shards.len();\n632\t        // Create a span for this node's scatter call\n633\t        let span = info_span!(\n634\t            \"scatter_node\",\n635\t            node_id = %node_id_clone,\n636\t            address = %node.address,\n637\t            shard_count = shard_count,\n638\t        );\n639\t        tasks.push(async move {\n640\t            let result = client_ref.search_node(&node_id_clone, &node.address, &req_clone).await;\n641\t            (node_id_clone, shards, result)\n642\t        }.instrument(span));\n643\t    }\n644\t\n645\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n646\t\n647\t    for (_node_id, shards, result) in results {\n648\t        match result {\n649\t            Ok(body) => {\n650\t                for _shard_id in shards {\n651\t                    shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body: body.clone() });\n652\t                }\n653\t            }\n654\t            Err(NodeError::Timeout) => {\n655\t                deadline_exceeded = true;\n656\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::Timeout); }\n657\t            }\n658\t            Err(e) => {\n659\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, e.clone()); }\n660\t            }\n661\t        }\n662\t    }\n663\t\n664\t    let partial = !failed_shards.is_empty();\n665\t\n666\t    match policy {\n667\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Error => {\n668\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n669\t                return Err(crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\"{} shard(s) unavailable\", failed_shards.len())));\n670\t            }\n671\t        }\n672\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial => {}\n673\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback => {\n674\t            // Group-unavailability fallback: try other replica groups for failed shards\n675\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n676\t                let mut fallback_pages = Vec::new();\n677\t                let mut remaining_failed = HashMap::new();\n678\t\n679\t                for (&shard_id, error) in &failed_shards {\n680\t                    let mut fallback_succeeded = false;\n681\t\n682\t                    // Try each other replica group\n683\t                    for group_id in 0..topology.replica_group_count() {\n684\t                        if group_id == plan.chosen_group {\n685\t                            continue; // Skip the already-tried group\n686\t                        }\n687\t\n688\t                        if let Some(group) = topology.group(group_id) {\n689\t                            let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), topology.rf());\n690\t                            if replicas.is_empty() {\n691\t                                continue;\n692\t                            }\n693\t\n694\t                            // Try each replica in the fallback group\n695\t                            for node_id in replicas {\n696\t                                if let Some(node) = topology.node(&node_id) {\n697\t                                    match client.search_node(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n698\t                                        Ok(body) => {\n699\t                                            fallback_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body });\n700\t                                            fallback_succeeded = true;\n701\t                                            break;\n702\t                                        }\n703\t                                        Err(_) => {\n704\t                                            continue; // Try next replica\n705\t                                        }\n706\t                                    }\n707\t                                }\n708\t                            }\n709\t\n710\t                            if fallback_succeeded {\n711\t                                break; // Found a working replica\n712\t                            }\n713\t                        }\n714\t                    }\n715\t\n716\t                    if !fallback_succeeded {\n717\t                        remaining_failed.insert(shard_id, error.clone());\n718\t                    }\n719\t                }\n720\t\n721\t                // Merge fallback results\n722\t                shard_pages.extend(fallback_pages);\n723\t\n724\t                // Update failed_shards with only those that truly failed\n725\t                if remaining_failed.is_empty() {\n726\t                    // All shards succeeded via fallback\n727\t                    return Ok(ScatterResult {\n728\t                        shard_pages,\n729\t                        failed_shards: HashMap::new(),\n730\t                        partial: false,\n731\t                        deadline_exceeded,\n732\t                    });\n733\t                } else {\n734\t                    // Some shards still failed\n735\t                    failed_shards = remaining_failed;\n736\t                }\n737\t            }\n738\t        }\n739\t    }\n740\t\n741\t    Ok(ScatterResult { shard_pages, failed_shards, partial, deadline_exceeded })\n742\t}\n743\t\n744\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n745\tpub async fn scatter_gather_search<C: NodeClient>(\n746\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n747\t    client: &C,\n748\t    req: SearchRequest,\n749\t    topology: &Topology,\n750\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n751\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n752\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n753\t    let scatter_result = execute_scatter(plan, client, req.clone(), topology, policy).await?;\n754\t\n755\t    let mut shard_pages = scatter_result.shard_pages;\n756\t    if scatter_result.partial {\n757\t        for shard_id in scatter_result.failed_shards.keys() {\n758\t            shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage {\n759\t                body: serde_json::json!({\"success\": false, \"message\": format!(\"shard {} unavailable\", shard_id)}),\n760\t            });\n761\t        }\n762\t    }\n763\t\n764\t    // Collect failed shard IDs for the X-Miroir-Degraded header\n765\t    let failed_shards: Vec<u32> = scatter_result.failed_shards.keys().copied().collect();\n766\t\n767\t    let merge_input = MergeInput {\n768\t        shard_hits: shard_pages,\n769\t        offset: req.offset,\n770\t        limit: req.limit,\n771\t        client_requested_score: req.ranking_score,\n772\t        facets: req.facets.clone(),\n773\t        failed_shards,\n774\t    };\n775\t\n776\t    // Span for the merge operation\n777\t    let _span = info_span!(\n778\t        \"merge\",\n779\t        shard_count = merge_input.shard_hits.len(),\n780\t        offset = req.offset,\n781\t        limit = req.limit,\n782\t    ).entered();\n783\t\n784\t    strategy.merge(merge_input)\n785\t}\n786\t\n787\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n788\t// OP#4: Global-IDF preflight execution\n789\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n790\t\n791\t/// Extract unique query terms from a search query string.\n792\tpub fn extract_query_terms(query: &Option<String>) -> Vec<String> {\n793\t    match query {\n794\t        Some(q) if !q.is_empty() => {\n795\t            let mut seen = std::collections::HashSet::new();\n796\t            let mut terms = Vec::new();\n797\t            for term in q.split_whitespace() {\n798\t                let lower = term.to_lowercase();\n799\t                if seen.insert(lower.clone()) { terms.push(lower); }\n800\t            }\n801\t            terms\n802\t        }\n803\t        _ => Vec::new(),\n804\t    }\n805\t}\n806\t\n807\t/// Execute the preflight phase: gather term frequencies from all shards.\n808\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count, term_count = req.terms.len()))]\n809\tpub async fn execute_preflight<C: NodeClient>(\n810\t    plan: &ScatterPlan,\n811\t    client: &C,\n812\t    req: &PreflightRequest,\n813\t    topology: &Topology,\n814\t) -> Result<GlobalIdf> {\n815\t    if req.terms.is_empty() {\n816\t        return Ok(GlobalIdf { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, terms: HashMap::new() });\n817\t    }\n818\t\n819\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n820\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n821\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n822\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n823\t        }\n824\t    }\n825\t\n826\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n827\t    for (node_id, _) in node_to_shards {\n828\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n829\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n830\t            None => continue,\n831\t        };\n832\t        let client_ref = client;\n833\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n834\t        let nid = node_id.clone();\n835\t        tasks.push(async move { client_ref.preflight_node(&nid, &node.address, &req_clone).await });\n836\t    }\n837\t\n838\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n839\t    let responses: Vec<PreflightResponse> = results.into_iter().filter_map(|r| r.ok()).collect();\n840\t    Ok(GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&responses))\n841\t}\n842\t\n843\t/// Execute a full dfs_query_then_fetch search (OP#4 global-IDF preflight).\n844\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n845\tpub async fn dfs_query_then_fetch_search<C: NodeClient>(\n846\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n847\t    client: &C,\n848\t    req: SearchRequest,\n849\t    topology: &Topology,\n850\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n851\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n852\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n853\t    let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n854\t        index_uid: req.index_uid.clone(),\n855\t        terms: extract_query_terms(&req.query),\n856\t        filter: req.filter.clone(),\n857\t    };\n858\t    let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, client, &preflight_req, topology).await?;\n859\t    let mut search_req = req;\n860\t    search_req.global_idf = Some(global_idf);\n861\t    scatter_gather_search(plan, client, search_req, topology, policy, strategy).await\n862\t}\n863\t\n864\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n865\t// Mock client\n866\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n867\t\n868\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Default)]\n869\tpub struct MockNodeClient {\n870\t    pub responses: HashMap<NodeId, Value>,\n871\t    pub preflight_responses: HashMap<NodeId, PreflightResponse>,\n872\t    pub write_responses: HashMap<NodeId, WriteResponse>,\n873\t    pub fetch_responses: search_node(\n880\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &SearchRequest,\n881\t    ) -> std::result::Result<Value, NodeError> {\n882\t        let _ = self.delay_ms;\n883\t        if  }\n897\t\n898\t    async fn write_documents(\n899\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &WriteRequest,\n900\t    ) -> std::result::Result<WriteResponse, NodeError> {\n901\t   }))\n911\t    }\n912\t\n913\t    async fn delete_documents(\n914\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &DeleteByIdsRequest,\n915\t    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse,     &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &DeleteByFilterRequest,\n928\t    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n929\t        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) {       }\n979\t            Ok(TaskStatusResponse {\n980\t                task_uid,\n981\t                status: \"succeeded\".to_string(),\n982\t                error: None,\n983\t                error_type: None,\n984\t            })\n985\t        }\n986\t    }\n987\t}\n988\t\n989\t#[cfg(test)]\n990\tmod tests {\n991\t    use super::*;\n992\t    use crate::topology::{Node, assert!(!r.degraded);\n1098\t    }\n1099\t\n1100\t    #[tokio::test]\n1101\t    async fn test_sg_degraded() {\n1102\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1103\t        let plan = [{\"id\": \"a\"}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n1106\t        c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), NodeError::Timeout);\n1107\t        let s = crate::merger::RrfStrategy::default_strategy();\n1108\t        assert!(scatter_gather_search(plan, &c, make_req(), &topo, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial, &s).await.unwrap().degraded);\n1109\t    }\n1110\t\n1111\t    #[test]\n1112\t    fn test_extract_query_terms() {\n1113\t        assert_eq!(extract_query_terms(&Some(\"hello world hello\".into())), vec![\"hello\", \"world\"]);\n1114\t        assert!(extract_query_terms(&None).is_empty());\n1115\t    }\n1116\t\n1117\t    #[test]\n1118\t    fn test_global_idf_aggregation() {\n1119\t        let resp = vec![\n1120\t            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"a\".into(), TermStats { df: 5000 })]) },\n1121\t            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 60.0, term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"a\".into(), TermStats { df: 4500 })]) },\n1122\t        ];\n1123\t        let g = GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&resp);\n1124\t        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 100000);\n1125\t        assert!((g.avg_doc_length - 55.0).abs() < 0.001);\n1126\t        assert_eq!(g.terms.get(\"a\").unwrap().df, 9500);\n1127\t    }\n1128\t\n1129\t    #[test]\n1130\t    fn test_global_idf_empty() {\n1131\t        let g = GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&[]);\n1132\t        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 0);\n1133\t        assert!(g.terms.is_empty());\n1134\t    }\n1135\t\n1136\t    #[tokio::test]\n1137\t    async fn test_execute_preflight() {\n1138\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1139\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, None).await;\n1140\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1141\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1142\t            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1143\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 3000 })]),\n1144\t        });\n1145\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1146\t            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n1147\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 2500 })]),\n1148\t        });\n1149\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1150\t            total_docs: 40000, avg_doc_length: 52.0,\n1151\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 4000 })]),\n1152\t        });\n1153\t        let req = PreflightRequest { index_uid: \"test\".into(), terms: vec![\"search\".into()], filter: None };\n1154\t        let g = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1155\t        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 100000);\n1156\t        assert_eq!(g.terms.get(\"search\").unwrap().df, 9500);\n1157\t    }\n1158\t\n1159\t    #[tokio::test]\n1160\t    async fn test_dfs_query_then_fetch() {\n1161\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1162\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, None).await;\n1163\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1164\t        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [{\"id\": \"a\", \"_rankingScore\": 0.9}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n1165\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1166\t            total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1167\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"test\".into(), TermStats { df: 500 })]),\n1168\t        });\n1169\t        let s = crate::merger::RrfStrategy::default_strategy();\n1170\t        let r = dfs_query_then_fetch_search(plan, &c, make_req(), &topo, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial, &s).await.unwrap();\n1171\t        assert!(!r.degraded);\n1172\t        assert!(!r.hits.is_empty());\n1173\t    }\n1174\t\n1175\t    /// Integration test for dfs_query_then_fetch with severely skewed shard distribution.\n1176\t    ///\n1177\t    /// This test simulates the scenario described in miroir-yio:\n1178\t    /// - Shard 0: Normal (1,000 docs, term df = 100)\n1179\t    /// - Shard 1: 100x normal (100,000 docs, term df = 10,000)\n1180\t    /// - Shard 2: Near-empty (10 docs, term df = 1)\n1181\t    ///\n1182\t    /// Without global IDF preflight, each shard would compute different local IDF values:\n1183\t    /// - Shard 0: IDF ≈ log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1184\t    /// - Shard 1: IDF ≈ log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1185\t    /// - Shard 2: IDF ≈ log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.8\n1186\t    ///\n1187\t    /// With global IDF preflight, all shards use the same IDF:\n1188\t    /// - Global: N = 101,010, df = 10,101\n1189\t    /// - IDF ≈ log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1190\t    ///\n1191\t    /// This ensures scores are comparable across shards, enabling correct score-based merge.\n1192\t    #[tokio::test]\n1193\t    async fn test_dfs_skewed_shards_global_idf_aggregation() {\n1194\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(3, 1, 1);\n1195\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), \"http://node-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1196\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), \"http://node-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n1197\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), \"http://node-2:7700\".into(), 0));\n1198\t\n1199\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 1, 3, None).await;\n1200\t\n1201\t        // Simulate severely skewed shard distribution\n1202\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1203\t\n1204\t        // Shard 0: Normal distribution\n1205\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1206\t            total_docs: 1000,\n1207\t            avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1208\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1209\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 100 }),\n1210\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 80 }),\n1211\t            ]),\n1212\t        });\n1213\t\n1214\t        // Shard 1: 100x normal (severely skewed)\n1215\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1216\t            total_docs: 100_000,\n1217\t            avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n1218\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1219\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 10_000 }),\n1220\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 8_000 }),\n1221\t            ]),\n1222\t        });\n1223\t\n1224\t        // Shard 2: Near-empty\n1225\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1226\t            total_docs: 10,\n1227\t            avg_doc_length: 45.0,\n1228\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1229\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n1230\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n1231\t            ]),\n1232\t        });\n1233\t\n1234\t        // Execute preflight to get global IDF\n1235\t        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n1236\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1237\t            terms: vec![\"machine\".into(), \"learning\".into()],\n1238\t            filter: None,\n1239\t        };\n1240\t\n1241\t        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1242\t\n1243\t        // Verify global aggregation\n1244\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 101_010);\n1245\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().df, 10_101);\n1246\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().df, 8_081);\n1247\t\n1248\t        // Verify global IDF is the same for all shards\n1249\t        // Expected IDF for \"machine\": log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1\n1250\t        let expected_idf_machine: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 10101.0 + 0.5) / (10101.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1251\t        let actual_idf_machine = global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().idf;\n1252\t        assert!((actual_idf_machine - expected_idf_machine).abs() < 0.001);\n1253\t\n1254\t        // Expected IDF for \"learning\": log((101010 - 8081 + 0.5) / (8081 + 0.5)) + 1\n1255\t        let expected_idf_learning: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 8081.0 + 0.5) / (8081.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1256\t        let actual_idf_learning = global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().idf;\n1257\t        assert!((actual_idf_learning - expected_idf_learning).abs() < 0.001);\n1258\t\n1259\t        // Verify that without global IDF, local IDF values would differ significantly\n1260\t        // Shard 0 local IDF for \"machine\": log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.19\n1261\t        // Shard 1 local IDF for \"machine\": log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.20\n1262\t        // Shard 2 local IDF for \"machine\": log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.85\n1263\t        let local_idf_shard_0: f64 = ((1000.0_f64 - 100.0 + 0.5) / (100.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1264\t        let local_idf_shard_2: f64 = ((10.0_f64 - 1.0 + 0.5) / (1.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1265\t        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - local_idf_shard_0).abs() > 0.2, \"Local IDF values should differ significantly\");\n1266\t        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - actual_idf_machine).abs() > 0.3, \"Global IDF should be closer to large-shard local IDF\");\n1267\t    }\n1268\t\n1269\t    /// Test that DFS preflight handles empty query terms gracefully.\n1270\t    #[tokio::test]\n1271\t    async fn test_dfs_empty_query_terms() {\n1272\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1273\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, None).await;\n1274\t        let c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1275\t\n1276\t        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n1277\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1278\t            terms: vec![],\n1279\t            filter: None,\n1280\t        };\n1281\t\n1282\t        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1283\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 0);\n1284\t        assert!(global_idf.terms.is_empty());\n1285\t    }\n1286\t\n1287\t    /// Test that DFS preflight handles partial failures gracefully.\n1288\t    #[tokio::test]\n1289\t    async fn test_dfs_partial_failure() {\n1290\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(3, 1, 1);\n1291\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), \"http://node-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1292\t that to_node_body correctly injects showRankingScore: true and sets limit to offset + limit.\n1328\t    #[test]\n1329\t    fn test_to_node_body_injects_show_ranking_score() {\n1330\t        let req = SearchRequest {\n1331\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1332\t            query: Some(\"rust programming\".into()),\n1333\t            offset: 10,\n1334\t            limit: 20,\n1335\t            filter: Some(serde_json::json!(\"status = published\")),\n1336\t            facets: Some(vec![\"category\".into(), \"tags\".into()]),\n1337\t            ranking_score: false, // Client didn't        let req = SearchRequest {\n1397\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1398\t            query: Some(\"test\".into()),\n1399\t            offset: 100,\n1400\t            limit: 50,\n1401\t            filter: None,\n1402\t            facets: None,\n1403\t            ranking_score: false,\n1404\t            body: serde_json::json!({}),\n1405\t            global_idf: None,\n1406\t        };\n1407\t\n1408\t        let body = req.to_node_body();\n1409\t\n1410\t        // limit must be offset + limit = 150 (fetch enough for coordinator pagination)\n1411\t test_group_fallback_on_partial_failure() {\n1420\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(16, 2, 2);\n1421\t        // Group 0: 2 nodes\n1422\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-0\".into()), \"http://g0-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1423\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-1\".into()), \"http://g0-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n1424\t        // Group 1: 2 nodes (healthy fallback targets)\n1425\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g1-0\".into()), \"http://g1-0:7700\".into(), 1));\n1426\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g1-1\".into()), \"http://g1-1:7700\".into(), 1));\n1427\t\n1428\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 16, None).await; // query_seq=0 → group 0\n1429\t        assert_eq!(plan.chosen_group, 0);\n1430\t\n1431\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1432\t\n1433\t        // Set up responses: all shards on group 1 nodes return valid data\n1434\t        let response_1 = serde_json::json!({\n1435\t            \"hits\": [{\"id\": \"doc1\", \"_rankingScore\": 0.9}],\n1436\t            \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1,\n1437\t            \"processingTimeMs\": 5,\n1438\t        });\n1439\t        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-g1-0\".into()), response_1.clone());\n1440\t        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-g1-1\".into()), response_1);\n1441\t\n1442\t        // All nodes in group 0 fail\n1443\t        c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-0\".into()), shards should succeed via group 1\n1449\t        let result = execute_scatter(plan, &c, req, &topo, UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback).await.unwrap();\n1450\t\n1451\t        // Should have succeeded via fallback (group 1)\n1452\t        assert!(!result.partial, \"Fallback should have succeeded\");\n1453\t        assert!(result.failed_shards.is_empty(), \"No shards should have failed after fallback\");\n1454\t        assert!(!result.shard_pages.is_empty(), \"Should have shard pages from fallback\");\n1455\t    }\n1456\t\n1457\t    /// Test group fallback when both groups are down.\n1458\t    #[tokio::test]\n1459\t    async fn test_group_fallback_all_groups_down() {\n1460\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(16, 2, 2);\n1461\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-0\".into()), \"http://g0-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1462\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-1\".into()), \"http://g0-1:7700\".into(), {\n1487\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(16, 2, 2);\n1488\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-0\".into()), \"http://g0-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1489\t   let result = execute_scatter(plan, &c, req, &topo, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial).await.unwrap();\n1510\t\n1511\t        assert!(result.partial, \"Should be partial\");\n1512\t
